editorial_note: APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS. Core story (NEJM Phase 1/2 publication + FDA Expanded Access authorization) verified verbatim against snapshots; four specifics (96% AE rate, 30% grade ≥3, RMC-6236-001 trial code, RASolute 303 trial name) attributed to cited sources are not present in those sources.
